description: fila specialises in high-quality sport footwear. The pair showcases the brand's versatility and ensures maximum style and comfort. Make these shoes from Fila your item du jour and wear them with jeans and a light hued tee.Upper Synthetic leather upper with stylised synthetic overlays for lightweight comfort Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Padded tongue and collar for a snug, all-day comfort Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort Fabric footbed for sweat-free wear Removable footbed to accommodate an orthotic Outsole TPR outsole with geometrical lugs strategically placed for absolute grip and traction on indoor and field courtsBranding on the midfoot area Outsole reinforced onto the upper as a heel guard for enhanced backfoot protection shoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
